Rome is one of the most visited cities in Europe. Here's what you need to know.

## The Colosseum

The Colosseum is Rome's most iconic landmark. Tickets cost around €16.

## Vatican City

The Vatican Museums and Sistine Chapel are a must. Book tickets in advance — the queues are brutal without them. Entry is about €20.

## Trastevere

Trastevere is a charming neighbourhood for an evening stroll. Grab dinner at one of the trattorias for €15–25 per person.
